query: I want to add support for the Morning Brew newsletter to NewsFlow — I've got a sample email saved at tests/fixtures/morning_brew_sample.html
add tldr crypto parser — they launched a new edition last month and I want it included in the daily pipeline
implement the Hacker Newsletter parser, it comes from hacker.newsletter@hacker.io and the structure is totally different from TLDR
we're onboarding a new newsletter source called AI Breakfast (newsletter@aibreakfast.com), need to hook it into ingestion
build a parser for the bloomberg technology email — sample HTML is at tests/fixtures/bloomberg_tech.html — it has a weird nested table layout
need to wire up the Import AI weekly digest by Jack Clark, register it in senders.yaml and write the parser class
implement et_ai — it's the Economic Times AI newsletter from ettech@email.indiatimes.com, different format from ETtech
benn stancil's data newsletter (benn@substack.com) just got added to our reading list, can you get it into the pipeline?
the tldr parser is only handling TLDR AI and TLDR Tech but they also send TLDR DevOps — can you extend it to cover that edition too?
add stratechery weekly digest as a source — it's paywalled but I forward it to rushilmisc77@gmail.com, fixture is in tests/fixtures/
the tldr parser is returning empty article lists for today's TLDR AI email — nothing is coming through at all
ETtech parser is failing on today's email — looks like they changed their HTML structure again
update senders.yaml — TLDR AI changed their sender address from dan@tldrnewsletter.com to ai@tldrnewsletter.com
what newsletters are currently supported by the pipeline?
the harper_carroll_parser is grabbing the wrong URLs — it's picking up tracking links instead of the real article URLs
add better error handling to the techcrunch parser for when an article cell has no anchor tag
write pytest unit tests for the et_ai_parser — I want coverage for the case where the email has no articles
refactor the tldr parser to use the new extract_links() method from base_parser.py
pipeline ran this morning but workspace/2026-03-16 only has raw_articles.json — nothing got curated
check today's output quality — how many articles made it through from ETtech?
